UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-24-2012 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-24-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Adbi Khouri is present.
Attorney Salvatore C. Timpano appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Griselda Romero aka Gricelda Romero and William Sansores are present.
Attorney Maxmiliano Garde representing the defendant through full scope.

Counsels and litigants confer in hallway.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of MAY-29-2012 is vacated.

Off Calendar May-09-2012 Amended
